roa.docketEntryComment: Agreement and Order Releasing Defendant on Own Recognizance
Pre-Sentenced Defendant Electronic Monitoring After Release and Report

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN & SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT/X:CLERK ANGEVIC AGDEPPA/X:BENCH WARRANT AND SHERIFF AFFIDAVIT WARRANT ARE DISCHARGED/X:COURT FINDS THE DEFENDANT IN CONTEMPT BUT WILL NOT IMPOSED JAIL TIME AT THIS TIME/X:BAIL REMAINS AT $5,000 AS PREVIOUSLY SET/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD:ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT 01-25-22/DOP/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:TRAILING ON 02-11-22/DOP/

/CAL: STATUS OF 21011365 AND CUSTODY STATUS/BWDNC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO TRAIL 21011365/DOP/

/CAL ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO DISMISS COUNTS 1 & 2 AS  WELL AS ADD COUNT 3, A 459,5PC, AMISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/GTWM/ACM/SA2:'OLD NAVY' 801 MARKET ST, SF CA & 'MACY'S 170 O'FARELL ST, SF CA/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD:TO TRAIL 21009195/DOP/
/CAL:TRAILING D11 FELONY CASES/CONTD: ACM ELIGIBILITY REPORT, TRAILING #21009195, #21011365, #21010526/DOP/
/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #21011365/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:2ND/X:2ND OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
/CAL: BENCH WARRANT RETURN/DAWT/BWDNC/X: BAIL REMAINS AS PREVIOUSLY SET//CONTD: STATUS OF #21011365 & CUSTODY STATUS/DOPC/
/CAL:TO SET, TRAILING #21009195/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:5,000/BWNUM:1ST/X:1ST OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
